prototypes.name: Navi OS v2
prototypes.description: Executive assistant operating system — prototype preview endpoint for proposed improvements.

prototypes.name: Cron Manager
prototypes.one-liner: Advanced cron job management and monitoring
prototypes.description: GUI for managing all Navi OS cron jobs. Shows last run, next run, error logs, and one-click enable/disable.

prototypes.name: Memory Bridge
prototypes.description: Attempted to sync memory state between multiple OpenClaw sessions. Design flawed — over-engineered for the actual use case.
